description: You are a middle school computer science teacher preparing a cryptography lesson on frequency analysis. Create a Python script at '/home/ga/Documents/letter_freq.py' that analyzes the text in '/home/ga/Documents/alice_in_wonderland.txt' to generate an English letter frequency table. The script must count occurrences of letters A-Z (case-insensitive, ignoring all other characters) and calculate the percentage frequency for each letter rounded to exactly two decimal places. Export the results to a CSV file at '/home/ga/Documents/frequencies.csv' with the header 'Letter,Count,Percentage'. The file must contain exactly 26 data rows sorted in descending order by the Count column.
